chat.question: How many deaths happened ?
chat.candidate_a: In the abiraterone trial, 664 (66%) of 1003 patients died. In the abiraterone and enzalutamide trial, 520 (57%) of 916 patients died.
chat.reconciled: In the abiraterone trial, 664 (66%) of 1003 patients died. In the abiraterone and enzalutamide trial, 520 (57%) of 916 patients died.
